items.headline: 3 things to watch in Celtics-76ers Game 2
items.description: A star turn for Tyrese Maxey, continued recovery for Jayson Tatum & Joel Embiid's availability are key for Celtics-Sixers Game 2.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Spurs-Trail Blazers Game 2
items.description: What’s next for Wembanyama? Can the Trail Blazers get help for Deni Avdija? Those questions and more will be answered soon.

items.headline: Timberwolves-Nuggets Game 2: Wolves claw back on the road
items.description: The Timberwolves and Nuggets have delivered and absorbed each other's best punch, setting up a series for the ages.

items.headline: Hawks-Knicks Game 2: Atlanta steals one at MSG
items.description: CJ McCollum shined for the Hawks in Game 2, as they overcame a 12-point deficit in the 4th quarter to even the series.

items.headline: Cavaliers-Raptors Game 2: Cleveland takes control of the series
items.description: Harden and Mitchell were too much for the Raptors in Game 2, and Toronto needs to find an answer to get back in the series.

items.headline: Recap: 2026 NBA Playoffs, R1 | Hawks, Timberwolves complete dramatic comebacks
items.description: Check out the best highlights, news and observations from Monday night's action in the 2026 NBA Playoffs with the NBA.com live blog.

items.headline: Spurs' Victor Wembanyama named 2025-26 Kia NBA Defensive Player of the Year
items.description: The 22-year-old Spurs superstar becomes the youngest Defensive Player of the Year in NBA history and the first unanimous winner.

items.headline: Ties broken for order of selection in NBA Draft 2026
items.description: The Jazz, Pelicans, Suns, Raptors, Rockets and Knicks won tiebreakers through random drawings to determine the NBA Draft order.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Rockets-Lakers Game 2
items.description: The Rockets need an offensive spark in Game 2, while the Lakers hope their depth can carry them to a 2-0 series edge.

items.headline: The Athletic: Nikola Jokić paced himself in Game 1 and won
items.description: The Nuggets star still notched a triple-double but didn't need to impose his will like we've so often seen. Denver will take that.

items.headline: Nets sign Jordi Fernández and coaching staff to contract extensions
items.description: Fernández has coached Brooklyn for 2 seasons after 15 years as an NBA assistant coach with Cleveland, Denver and Sacramento.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Timberwolves-Nuggets Game 2
items.description: The Nuggets' defense on Anthony Edwards, Minnesota's bench and the big man matchup should all prove key during Game 2 in Denver.

items.headline: Playoff Power Rankings: Where all 16 teams stand at top of first round
items.description: With Game 1s in the books, John Schuhmann makes the case for — and against — each of the playoff teams to win the 2026 NBA title.

items.headline: Starting 5: Sunday's thrills cap epic opening to 2026 Playoffs
items.description: Victor Wembanyama and Paolo Banchero are among Sunday's standouts, plus we look ahead to Monday's trio of Game 2s.

items.headline: 76ers-Celtics Game 1: Boston delivers Philadelphia a dose of 'Celtics basketball' in opener
items.description: Joel Embiid's absence looms large, Jayson Tatum eases his way back and more from a dominant showing by the Celtics in Game 1.
